title: Smoky Crusty Argentinian Duck Skewers
description: A festive tandoori-inspired dish featuring argentine-style duck legs that are both fresh and crunchy. This pescatarian-friendly recipe marries the flavors of a traditional Argentinian asado with smoky tandoor techniques for a delightful twist.
instructions: Combine minced garlic, jalapenos, olive oil, cumin seeds, coriander seeds, smoked paprika, salt, ground cumin, and garam masala in a bowl. Mix well.
Place duck legs on skewers and rub the marinade mixture evenly over all surfaces of the meat.
Preheat tandoor oven to 250°C (475°F) for at least 1 hour before using it to cook the skewers.
Once the tandoor is hot, place the skewers inside. Cook until fully cooked and charred, about 30-45 minutes. Monitor seasoning during cooking for desired level of smokiness.
Allow the duck to rest off the skewers before serving with sides like chimichurri sauce or a fresh green salad.
